name: Bio Plant

name: Black Luster Soldier - Envoy of the Beginning
text:
Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 LIGHT and 1 DARK monster from your Graveyard. Once per turn, you can activate 1 of these effects.
Target 1 monster on the field: banish that target face-up. This card cannot attack the turn you activate this effect.
During the Damage Step, if this attacking card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: It can make a second attack in a row.

Destroy all face-up Attack Position monsters on your opponent's side of the field and inflict 1000 points of damage to your opponent's Life Points.

Then, during your opponent's next Standby Phase: Destroy the monster this card is equipped to, and if you do, inflict damage to your opponent equal to the ATK the destroyed monster had on the field.

This card gains 300 ATK for each Dragon-Type monster in your Graveyard. You can negate the effects of Spells, Traps, and Effect Monsters that target this card.

You can Special Summon this card from your hand (but Tributes are required if it is Level 5 or higher). This card cannot attack during the turn it is Summoned. This card cannot attack unless you pay 500 Life Points. When "Toon World" is destroyed, destroy this card. If your opponent doesn't control a Toon Monster, this card can attack your opponent directly. If your opponent controls a face-up Toon Monster, you must select it as an attack target.

name: Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon

"Gazelle the King of Mythical Beasts" + "Berfomet"
(This card is always treated as a "Phantom Beast" card.)

If it is not a Monster Card, all 3 cards are sent to the Graveyard.

Change the Union Monster back to a monster in face-up Attack or Defense Position. Also, the monster that was equipped with the Union Monster may attack again this turn.

name: Crab Turtle
text: This monster can only be Ritual Summoned with the Ritual Magic Card, "Turtle Oath". You must also offer monsters whose total Level Stars equal 8 or more as a Tribute form your Field or your hand.

name: Guardian Angel Joan

Each time this card destroys 1 of your opponent's monsters and sends it to the Graveyard as a result of battle, increase the ATK of this card by 1000 points. Also, the effects of an Effect Monster that this card destroys as a result of battle are negated.

name: Guardian Ceal

name: Guardian Elma

name: Guardian Grarl
text: This card can only be Normal Summoned, Flip Summoned, or Special Summoned when there is a "Gravity Axe - Grarl" on your side of the field. If this is the only card in your hand, you can Special Summon it.

name: Guardian Kay'est
text: Cannot be Summoned unless you control a face-up "Rod of Silence - Kay'est". This card is unaffected by Spell effects and cannot be targeted for attacks, but does not prevent your opponent from attacking you directly.

name: Guardian of the Labyrinth

name: Guardian of the Throne Room

name: Guardian Sphinx

name: Guardian Statue

name: Guardian Tryce

When this card is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard, Special Summon to your side of the field the monster in the Graveyard that was used for the Tribute Summon of this card.

name: Gust

name: Gust Fan

name: Gyaku-Gire Panda

name: Hammer Shot

name: Hane-Hane

name: Haniwa

name: Hard Armor

name: Harpie Lady

name: Harpie Lady 1

name: Harpie Lady 2

name: Harpie Lady 3

name: Harpie Lady Sisters

name: Dark Magician of Chaos

name: Harpie's Pet Baby Dragon
text:
This card gains effects based on the number of "Harpie" monsters you control, except "Harpie's Pet Baby Dragon".
● 1 or more: Your opponent cannot target "Harpie" monsters you control for attacks, except "Harpie's Pet Baby Dragon".
● 2 or more: Double the original ATK and DEF of this card.
● 3 or more: Once per turn: You can target 1 card your opponent controls; destroy that target.

name: Harpies' Hunting Ground

When equipped to a monster by this card's effect, that monster gains 500 ATK and DEF. (1 monster can only be equipped with 1 Union Monster at a time. If the equipped monster would be destroyed, this card is destroyed instead.)

If this card was destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard, this effect activates at the end of each of your opponent's Battle Phases: Discard 1 random card from your opponent's hand. This card must be in the Graveyard to activate and to resolve this effect.

name: Hercules Beetle

If this card inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent's Life Points, your opponent must discard all cards in his/her hand during the next Draw Phase before they draw.

name: Hinotama

When this card inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent, you can activate 1 of these effects:
Discard 1 random card from their hand.
Send the top 2 cards of their Deck to the Graveyard.

When the selected monster is removed from the field, destroy this card.

name: Exiled Force

name: Inaba White Rabbit

If the result is 2 or 5, negate the effect and destroy the opponent's card. As long as this card remains on the field, during each Standby Phase, increase the ATK of 1 Archfiend Monster Card by 1000 points until the End Phase.

When this card destroys an opponent's monster as a result of battle and sends it to the Graveyard, inflict 1500 points of damage to your opponent's Life Points.

name: Insect Queen

During the End-Phase, if this card destroyed an opponent's monster by battle this turn: Special Summon 1 "Insect Monster Token" (Insect-Type/EARTH/Level 1/ATK 100/DEF 100) in Attack Position.

name: Insect Soldiers of the Sky
text: The ATK of this card increases by 1000 points whenever it attacks a Wind monster.

name: Jellyfish

name: Jigen Bakudan
text: FLIP: After this card is flipped, offer it as a Tribute during your Standby Phase to destroy all monsters on your side of the Field and inflict Direct Damage equal to half of the total ATK of the destroyed cards (excluding this monster) to your opponent's Life Points.

name: Giant Trunade

name: Jinzo #7

Negate the activation and the effect of a Spell Card controlled by your opponent that has the effect of destroying Spell and/or Trap Card(s) on the field and destroy it. After that, you can destroy 1 face-up monster on your opponent's side of the field and inflict damage to your opponent equal to the ATK of the destroyed monster.

name: Judgment of the Pharaoh
text:
Pay half of your Life Points. Select and activate an appropriate effect which can be applied:
● If "Yu-Jo Friendship" is in your Graveyard, until the end of this turn: your opponent cannot Normal Summon, Set, Flip Summon, or Special Summon a monster(s) or activate an Effect Monster's effect.
● If "Unity" is in your Graveyard, until the end of this turn: negate the effects of all Spell and Trap Cards on your opponent's side of the field, and your opponent cannot activate or Set Spell or Trap Cards.

name: Jurassic World

text: When this card destroys a monster and sends it to the Graveyard as a result of battle, inflict damage to your opponent's Life Points equal to the Level of the destroyed monster x 500 points.

name: Kagemusha of the Blue Flame

The cards that are already on the field before this card's activation are unaffected by this effect.

name: Kaiser Dragon

name: Kaiser Sea Horse

name: Kamakiriman

name: Kangaroo Champ

text: ''An amphibian that sold his soul for unlimited power to avenge his late friend.''

Lord of D. + "Divine Dragon Ragnarok"
As long as this card remains face-up on the field, your opponent cannot target Dragon-Type monsters for the effect of a Spell, Trap, or Monster Card. Once per turn, you can Special Summon 1 Dragon-Type monster from your hand to your side of the field.

When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard, by removing from play 1 other "King of the Skull Servants" or "Skull Servant" card in your Graveyard, Special Summon this card.

name: Kiryu

While equipped to a monster by this card's effect, increase the ATK/DEF of the equipped monster by 900 points, and you can Tribute this card to allow the equipped monster to attack your opponent's Life Points directly this turn. (1 monster can only be equipped with 1 Union Monster at a time. If the equipped monster is destroyed as a result of battle, destroy this card instead.)"

name: Kiseitai

During each of your opponent's Standby Phases, increase your Life Points by half of the ATK of the monster equipped with this card.

name: Koitsu

While equipped to a monster by this card's effect, increase the ATK of the equipped monster by 3000 points. When it attacks with an ATK that is higher than the DEF of a Defense Position monster, inflict the difference as Battle Damage to your opponent's Life Points. (1 monster can only be equipped with 1 Union Monster at a time. If the equipped monster is destroyed as a result of battle, destroy this card instead.)"

name: Kojikocy

(If a monster is Summoned or flipped face-up that has the same name as a monster that is already face-up on the field, the new face-up monster is destroyed. If they are Summoned or flipped face-up at the same time, they are all destroyed.)

Activate 1 or both of these effects (simultaneously).
● When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Target the attacking monster; change that target to Defense Position.
● Target 1 face-up monster you control; equip this card to that target. It gains 500 ATK.

Activate 1 of these effects:

text: As long as this card remains face-up on the field, the field is treated as Umi" (however there is no increasing or decreasing of ATK/DEF due to "Umi"'s effect). If there is an active Field Spell Card on the field, this effect is not applied."

Both you and your opponent can then Special Summon from your hand the same number of Monster Cards on the field in face-down Defense Position.

name: Manga Ryu-Ran

You can Special Summon this card from your hand (but Tributes are required if it is Level 5 or higher). This card cannot attack during the turn it is Summoned. This card cannot attack unless you pay 500 Life Points. When "Toon World" is destroyed, destroy this card. If your opponent doesn't control a Toon Monster, this card can attack your opponent directly. If your opponent controls a face-up Toon Monster, you must select it as an attack target.

name: Marauding Captain

text: You do not have to pay any Life Points to activate a Spell Card.

name: Spell of Pain
text: When your opponent activates a card or effect that would inflict effect damage to you: Your opponent takes the effect damage from that card or effect, instead.

name: Spell Power Grasp
text: Target 1 face-up card on the field that you can place a Spell Counter on; place 1 Spell Counter on that target, then you can add 1 "Spell Power Grasp" from your Deck to your hand. You can only activate 1 "Spell Power Grasp" per turn.

name: Spell Purification
text: Discard 1 card from your hand. Destroy all face-up Continuous Spell Cards on the field.

name: Spell Reproduction
text: Send 2 Spell Cards from your hand to the Graveyard, then target 1 Spell Card in your Graveyard; add that target to your hand.

name: Spell Shattering Arrow
text: Destroy as many face-up Spells your opponent controls as possible, and if you do, inflict 500 damage to your opponent for each.

name: Spell Shield Type-8
text:
Select and activate 1 of these effects:
Negate the activation and the effect of a Spell Card that targets 1 monster on the field and destroy the Spell Card.
Send 1 Spell Card from your hand to the Graveyard to negate the activation and the effect of a Spell Card and destroy it.

name: Spell Vanishing
text: Discard 2 cards from your hand. Negate the activation of a Spell Card and destroy it. Also, look at your opponent's hand and Deck and if you find any Spell Cards of the same name as the destroyed Spell Card, send all of them to the Graveyard.

name: Spell-Stopping Statute
text: You can only activate this card when your opponent activates a Continuous Spell Card. Negate the activation and the effect of the card and destroy it.

name: Spellbinding Circle
text: Select 1 monster your opponent controls. It cannot attack or change its battle position. When that monster is destroyed, destroy this card.

name: Spellbook Organization
text: Look at the top 3 cards of your Deck, then return them to the top of the Deck in any order.

name: Spherous Lady
text: Many have been deceived by the beauty of this vampire.

name: Sphinx Teleia
text: You can pay 500 Life Points to Special Summon this card when "Pyramid of Light" is on the field. This card cannot attack during the turn that it is Normal Summoned or Special Summoned. This card cannot be Special Summoned from the Graveyard. If this card destroys a Defense Position monster as a result of battle, inflict damage to your opponents Life Points equal to half the DEF of the destroyed monster.

name: Spike Seadra
text: Using the spikes sprouting from its body, this creature stabs its opponents and floods them with electricity.

name: Spikebot
text: A mechanical soldier created by a wicked sorcerer, it attacks with the two steel balls attached to its arms.

name: Spiked Snail
text: ''A very fast, bipedal snail with a pair of lethal arms.''

name: Spiral Spear Strike
text: When "Gaia the Fierce Knight", "Swift Gaia the Fierce Knight" or "Gaia the Dragon Champion" on your side of the field attacks a Defense Position monster, if the ATK of that card is higher than the DEF of the Defense Position monster, inflict the difference as Battle Damage to your opponent's Life Points. If "Gaia the Dragon Champion" inflicts Battle Damage with this effect, draw 2 cards from your Deck and discard 1 card from your hand.

name: Spirit Barrier
text: While you control a monster(s), you take no Battle Damage.

name: Spirit Caller
text: FLIP: You can Special Summon 1 Level 3 or lower Normal Monster from your Graveyard to your side of the field.

name: Spirit Elimination
text: When monsters in the Graveyard are removed from play, remove monsters on your side of the field from play as substitutes. This card remains active until the end of the turn that it is activated. The substitutes remain removed from play.

name: Spirit Message "A"
text: This card can only be placed on the field by the effect of "Destiny Board".

name: Spirit Message "I"
text: This card can only be placed on the field by the effect of "Destiny Board".

name: Spirit Message "L"
text: This card can only be placed on the field by the effect of "Destiny Board".

name: Spirit Message "N"
text: This card can only be placed on the field by the effect of "Destiny Board".

name: Spirit of Flames
text: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card can only be Special Summoned by removing 1 FIRE monster in your Graveyard from play. Increase the ATK of this monster by 300 points during your Battle Phase.

name: Spirit of the Books
text: This wise spirit dwells in books, using its accumulated knowledge to defeat enemies.

name: Spirit of the Breeze
text: As long as this card remains in face-up Attack Position on your side of the field, increase your Life Points by 1000 points during each of your Standby Phases.

name: Spirit of the Harp
text: A spirit that soothes the soul with the music of its heavenly harp.

name: Spirit of the Mountain
text: ''An elderly magician that raises mountains with his flute.''

name: Spirit of the Pharaoh
text: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card cannot be Special Summoned except by the effect of The First Sarcophagus". When this card is Special Summoned, you can Special Summon up to 4 Level 2 or lower Zombie-Type Normal Monsters from your Graveyard."

name: Spirit of the Pot of Greed
text: While this card is in face-up Attack Position on the field, if a player activates Pot of Greed", they can draw 1 more card."

name: Spirit of the Winds
text: ''A spirit of the wind that calls up a storm when it's in a bad mood.''

name: Dark Renewal
text: When your opponent Normal or Special Summons a monster(s): Target 1 of those monsters and 1 Spellcaster monster you control; send both monsters to the GY, then you can Special Summon 1 DARK Spellcaster monster from your Deck or GY.

name: Spirit Ryu
text: You can only activate this effect during your Battle Step, if this card battles during your turn. Discard 1 Dragon-Type monster from your hand to the Graveyard to increase the ATK and DEF of this card by 1000 points until the End Step.

name: Spirit's Invitation
text: Each time your Spirit monster returns to your hand, select 1 monster on your opponent's side of the field and return it to its owner's hand. Pay 500 Life Points during each of your Standby Phases. If you do not, destroy this card.

name: Spiritual Energy Settle Machine
text: As long as this card remains face-up on the field, all Spirit monsters remain face-up on the field and do not return to their owners' hands during the End Phase even if they are Normal Summoned or flipped face-up. Discard 1 card from your hand during each of your End Phases. If you do not, destroy this card. When this card is removed from the field, all face-up Spirit monsters return to the owners' hands.

name: Spiritual Wind Art - Miyabi
text: Tribute 1 WIND monster, then target 1 card your opponent controls; place that card on the bottom of the Deck.

name: Spiritualism
text: Return 1 Spell or Trap Card on your opponent's side of the field to his/her hand. This card's activation and effect cannot be negated by any other card.

name: Spring of Rebirth
text: Increase your Life Points by 500 points every time monsters return from the field to the owner's hand.

name: St. Joan
text: The Forgiving Maiden + "Marie the Fallen One"

name: Stamping Destruction

name: Star Boy
text: As long as this card remains face-up on the field, increase the ATK of all WATER monsters by 500 points and decrease the ATK of all FIRE monsters by 400 points.

name: Statue of the Wicked
text: When this face-down card is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard, Special Summon 1 Wicked Token" (Fiend-Type/DARK/Level 4/ATK 1000/DEF 1000) on your side of the field."

name: Staunch Defender
text: You can only activate this card when your opponent declares an attack. Select 1 face-up monster on your side of the field. During this turn, your opponent can only designate the selected monster as an attack target and your opponent must attack the selected monster with all face-up monsters.

name: Stealth Bird
text: Once per turn: You can change this card to face-down Defense Position. When this card is Flip Summoned: Inflict 1000 damage to your opponent.

name: Steel Ogre Grotto #1
text: A steel idol worshiped in the Land of Machines.

name: Steel Ogre Grotto #2
text: A mechanized iron doll with tremedous strength.

name: Steel Scorpion

name: Steel Shell

name: Stim-Pack
text: A monster equipped with this card increases its ATK by 700 points. Its ATK is then decreased by 200 points at each of its Standby Phases.

name: Stone Armadiller
text: Dis stone crittah's got rock-hahd fur. Dat gives him some really good dee-fense!

name: Stone Dragon

name: Stone Ghost

name: Stone Ogre Grotto
text: A behemoth shaped by giant boulders.

name: Stone Statue of the Aztecs

name: Stop Defense

name: Stray Lambs
text: If you activate this card, you cannot Normal Summon, Flip Summon or Special Summon during this turn. Special Summon 2 "Lamb Tokens" (Beast-Type/EARTH/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0) in Defense Position.

name: Strike Ninja

name: Stronghold the Moving Fortress

name: Stuffed Animal

name: Stumbling
text: Any monster that is Normal Summoned, Flip Summoned or Special Summoned is changed to Defense Position.

name: Succubus Knight
text: A warrior wizard adept in casting bone-chilling spells.

name: Suijin
text: Reduct the ATK of an opponent's monster attacking this card to 0. This effect can be used only once. The card's owner chooses when to activate this effect.

name: Summoned Skull
text: A fiend with dark powers for confusing the enemy. Among the Fiend-Type monsters, this monster boasts considerable force.

name: Summoner Monk

name: Summoner of Illusions

name: Super Robolady
text: Robolady + "Roboyarou" You can Special Summon "Super Roboyarou" by returning this card from the field to the Fusion Deck. You cannot use this effect during the same turn this monster is Special Summoned. In addition, increase the ATK of this monster by 1000 points during the Damage Step when this monster inflicts Direct Damage to your opponent's Life Points.

name: Super Roboyarou
text: Roboyarou + "Robolady" You can Special Summon "Super Robolady" by returning this card from the field to the Fusion Deck. You cannot use this effect during the same turn this monster is Special Summoned. In addition, increase the ATK of this monster by 1000 points during the Damage Step when this monster inflicts Direct Damage to your opponent's Life Points.

name: Super War-Lion
text: You can Ritual Summon this card with "War-Lion Ritual".

name: Supply
text: FLIP: Return 2 Fusion-Material monsters that were sent to the Graveyard as a result of a Fusion Summon to your hand.

name: Supporter in the Shadows
text: ''A cute little elf that hides in the shadows and provides spiritual support.''

name: Susa Soldier
text: This card cannot be Special Summoned. This card returns to the owner's hand during the End Phase of the turn that this card is Normal Summoned or flipped face-up. The Battle Damage this card inflicts to your opponent's Life Points is halved.

name: Swallow's Nest
text: Tribute 1 face-up Winged Beast-Type monster; Special Summon 1 Winged Beast-Type monster from your Deck with the same Level the Tributed monster had on the field.

name: Swamp Battleguard
text: This card gains 500 ATK for each "Lava Battleguard" you control.

name: Swarm of Locusts
text: Once per turn, you can flip this card into face-down Defense Position. When this card is Flip Summoned, destroy 1 Spell or Trap Card your opponent controls.

name: Swarm of Scarabs
text: Once per turn, you can flip this card into face-down Defense Position. When this card is Flip Summoned, destroy 1 monster your opponent controls.

name: Swift Birdman Joe
text: If you Tribute Summon this card by Tributing a WIND monster, return all Spell and Trap Cards on the field to the owners' hands.

name: Swift Gaia the Fierce Knight
text: If this is the only card in your hand, you can Normal Summon it without Tributing.

name: Sword Arm of Dragon
text: This Jurassic juggernaut has a spine covered in sword-like plates, and a tail to split open skulls.

name: Sword Hunter
text:
At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card destroyed a monster(s) by battle and sent it to the Graveyard this Battle Phase: Equip all those monsters from the Graveyard to this card as an Equip Spell Card(s) with this effect.
The equipped monster gains 200 ATK.

name: Sword of Dark Destruction
text: A Dark monster equipped with this card increases its ATK by 400 points and decreases its DEF by 200 points.

name: Sword of Deep-Seated
text: A Monster Card equipped with this card increases its ATK and DEF by 500 points. When this card is sent to the Graveyard, place it on top of your Deck.

name: Sword of Dragon's Soul
text: This card can only be equipped to a Warrior-Type monster. A monster equipped with this card increases its ATK by 700 points. A Dragon-Type monster that battles with the monster equipped with this card is destroyed at the end of the Battle Phase. (Damage Calculation is applied normally.).

name: Sword of the Soul-Eater

When you activate this card, Tribute all Normal Monsters (except Tokens) on your side of the field, except the equipped monster. Increase the ATK of the equipped monster by 1000 points for each Normal Monster that you Tributed.

name: Sword Slasher
text: A lethal engine of destruction that wields two well-honed blades.

name: Swords of Concealing Light

name: Elemental HERO Prisma
text: Once per turn: You can reveal 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, then send 1 of the Fusion Materials whose name is mentioned on that card from your Deck to the GY; this card's name becomes the sent monster's until the End Phase.

name: Swordsman from a Distant Land

name: Swordsman of Landstar
text: An amateur with a sword, this fairy warrior relies on its mysterious powers.

name: Swordstalker
text: A monster formed by the vengeful souls of those who passed away in battle.

name: Synchar
text: ''This two-headed creature spits laser blasts at its enemies.''

name: Tactical Espionage Expert
text: When this card is Normal Summoned successfully, no Trap Cards can be activated.

name: Tailor of the Fickle
text: Select 1 equipped Equip Card and switch it to another correct target.

name: Tainted Wisdom
text: When this card is changed from Attack Position to Defense Position, shuffle your own Deck.

name: Takriminos
text: A member of a race of sea serpents that freely travels through the sea.

name: Takuhee
text: This bird is known far and wide as a harbinger of doom.

name: Talisman of Spell Sealing
text: You can only activate this card while there is a face-up Sealmaster Meisei" on your side of the field. While this card is face-up on the field, Spell Cards cannot be activated and the effects of face-up Spell Cards on the field are negated. When "Sealmaster Meisei" is removed from the field, destroy this card."

name: Talisman of Trap Sealing
text: You can only activate this card while there is a face-up Sealmaster Meisei" on your side of the field. While this card is face-up on the field, Trap Cards cannot be activated and the effects of face-up Trap Cards on the field are negated. When "Sealmaster Meisei" is removed from the field, destroy this card."

name: Tao the Chanter
text: ''Master of Yin and Yang, this wizard handles a delicate balance of spells and counter spells.''

name: Tatsunootoshigo
text: ''A bizarre monster with the torso of a horse and a fish's tail. It gallops through the sea as if it were the wind.''

name: Taunt

name: Temple of Skulls

name: Temple of the Kings
text: You can activate 1 Trap Card the turn it was Set. You can send 1 "Mystical Beast of Serket" in your Monster Zone and this card you control to the Graveyard; Special Summon 1 monster from your hand or Deck, or 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck. You can only use each effect of "Temple of the Kings" once per turn.

name: Tenderness
text: ''An adorable fairy that celebrates the gift of love.''

name: Tenkabito Shien
text: This card is unaffected by the effects of Trap Cards.

name: Tentacle Plant

name: Terra the Terrible
text: Known as a swamp dweller, this creature is a minion of the dark forces.

name: Terraforming
text: Add 1 Field Spell Card from your Deck to your hand.

name: Terrorking Archfiend
text: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Flip Summoned unless you have an Archfiend Monster Card on your side of the field. The controller of this card pays 800 Life Points during each of his/her Standby Phases (this is not optional). When this card is targeted by the effect of a card controlled by your opponent, when resolving the effect, roll a six-sided die. If the result is 2 or 5, negate the effect and destroy the opponent's card. The effects of an Effect Monster that this card destroyed as a result of battle are negated.

name: Terrorking Salmon
text: A feared salmon, master of the Sea of Darkness. Its roe is the best delicacy in the World of Darkness.

name: Teva
text: When this card is Tribute Summoned successfully, your opponent cannot declare an attack during his/her next turn.

name: That Which Feeds on Life

name: The 13th Grave

name: The A. Forces

name: The Agent of Creation - Venus
text: You can pay 500 Life Points; Special Summon 1 "Mystical Shine Ball" from your hand or Deck.

name: The Agent of Force - Mars
text: This card is unaffected by any Spell Cards. While "The Sanctuary in the Sky" is on your side of the field, and your Life Points are higher than your opponent's Life Points, increase the ATK and DEF of this card by the difference between your and your opponent's Life Points.

name: The Agent of Judgment - Saturn
text: While your Life Points are higher than your opponent's, you can Tribute this card to inflict damage to your opponent equal to the difference. If you do not control "The Sanctuary in the Sky", this effect is not applied. You cannot conduct your Battle Phase the turn you activate this effect.

name: The Agent of Wisdom - Mercury
text: During your Standby Phase, if you controlled this face-up card and had no cards in your hand at the end of the opponent's last End Phase: Draw 1 card.

name: The All-Seeing White Tiger
text: A proud ruler of the jungle that some fear and others respect.

name: The Bewitching Phantom Thief
text: ''An elegant thief with a black cloak that charms its enemies.''

name: The Big March of Animals
text: Until the End Phase, increase the ATK of all face-up Beast-Type monsters on your side of the field by 200 points for each Beast-Type monster on your side of the field.

name: The Bistro Butcher
text: When this card inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent's Life Points, your opponent draws 2 cards from their Deck.

name: The Cheerful Coffin
text: You can discard up to 3 Monster Cards from your hand to the Graveyard.

name: The Creator
text: This card cannot be Special Summoned from the Graveyard. Once per turn, you can select 1 monster in your Graveyard, then send 1 card from your hand to the Graveyard and Special Summon that monster.

name: The Creator Incarnate
text: You can Tribute this card to Special Summon 1 "The Creator" from your hand.

name: The Dark - Hex-Sealed Fusion
text: You can substitute this card for any 1 Fusion Material Monster. The other Fusion Material Monster(s) must be the correct one(s). By Tributing Fusion Material Monsters on the field, including this card, Special Summon 1 DARK Fusion Monster from your Fusion Deck.

name: The Dark Door
text: Only 1 monster can attack during each Battle Phase.

name: The Dragon Dwelling in the Cave
text: A huge dragon dwelling in a cave. It is horrible when it gets angry, although it is usually quiet. It is said to preserve certain treasures.

name: The Dragon's Bead
text: Discard 1 card from your hand. Negate the effect of a Trap Card that targets 1 face-up Dragon-Type monster and destroy the Trap Card.

name: The Drdek
text: ''A bipedal eyeball that seldom misses an enemy with its lethal talons.''

name: The Earl of Demise
text: This gentlemanly creature is extremely wicked, feared by man and fiend alike.

name: The Earth - Hex-Sealed Fusion
text: You can substitute this card for any 1 Fusion Material Monster. The other Fusion Material Monster(s) must be the correct one(s). By Tributing Fusion Material Monsters on the field, including this card, Special Summon 1 EARTH Fusion Monster from your Fusion Deck.

name: The Emperor's Holiday
text: Negate all Equip Card effects on the field.

name: The End of Anubis
text: As long as this card remains face-up on the field, all effects of Spell, Trap, and Effect Monster Cards that target a card(s) in the Graveyard or that activate in the Graveyard are negated.

name: The Eye of Timaeus
text:
(This card is also always treated as "Legendary Dragon Timaeus".)
Target 1 "Dark Magician" monster you control; Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck that lists that monster on the field as Fusion Material, using it as the Fusion Material. You can only activate 1 "The Eye of Timaeus" per turn.

name: The Eye of Truth
text: As long as this card remains face-up on the field, your opponent must show his/her hand. Your opponent increases his/her Life Points by 1000 points during each of his/her Standby Phases if he/she has a Spell Card in his/her hand.

name: The Fiend Megacyber
text: If your opponent controls at least 2 more monsters than you do, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand).

name: The First Sarcophagus
text: During each of your opponent's End Phases, place 1 card face-up on your side of the field from your hand or Deck in this order: The Second Sarcophagus", "The Third Sarcophagus". If 1 Sarcophagus card is removed from your side of the field, all of them on your side of the field are sent to the Graveyard. When you have all 3 Sarcophagus cards on your side of the field, send all Sarcophagus cards on your side of the field to the Graveyard to Special Summon 1 "Spirit of the Pharaoh" from your hand or Deck."

name: The Flute of Summoning Dragon
text: Special Summon up to 2 Dragon-Type monsters from your hand. There must be a face-up "Lord of D." on the field to activate and to resolve this effect.

name: Goblin Zombie
text: If this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent: Send the top card of their Deck to the GY. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: Add 1 Zombie monster with 1200 or less DEF from your Deck to your hand.

name: The Forgiving Maiden
text: Offer this face-up card as a Tribute to return 1 of your monsters destroyed in battle during this turn to your hand.

name: The Furious Sea King
text: Grand King of the Seven Seas, he's able to summon massive tidal waves to drown the enemy.

name: The Graveyard in the Fourth Dimension
text: Add 2 monsters in your Graveyard that have "LV" in their card name to your Deck and shuffle it.

name: The Gross Ghost of Fled Dreams
text: This monster feeds on the dreams of an unwary sleeper, dragging the victim into eternal slumber.

name: The Hunter with 7 Weapons
text: When this card is Normal Summoned, declare 1 Type of monster. When battling that Type of monster, increase the ATK of this card by 1000 points during Damage Calculation.

name: The Illusory Gentleman
text: Wearing odd fashions, this gentleman is very fickle. He sometimes saves people and at other times commits crimes.

name: The Immortal of Thunder
text: FLIP: Increase your Life Points by 3000 points. When this card is sent from the field to the Graveyard, you lose 5000 Life Points.

name: The Inexperienced Spy
text: Select and see 1 card in your opponent's hand.

name: The Judgement Hand
text: An all-powerful hand that delivers ruthless attacks.

name: The Kick Man
text: When this card is Special Summoned, you can equip 1 appropriate Equip Spell Card from your Graveyard to this card.

name: The Last Warrior from Another Planet
text:
Zombyra the Dark + "Maryokutai"
When this card is Special Summoned, destroy all monsters on your side of the field except this card. As long as this card remains face-up on the field, neither player can Normal Summon, Flip Summon or Special Summon any monster."

name: The Law of the Normal
text: You can only activate this card while there are 5 face-up Level 2 or lower Normal Monsters on your side of the field. Both players discard all cards in their hands, and destroy all cards on the field except Level 2 or lower Normal Monsters.

name: The Legendary Fisherman
text: While "Umi" is on the field, this card is unaffected by Spell effects and cannot be targeted for attacks, but does not prevent your opponent from attacking you directly.

name: The Light - Hex-Sealed Fusion
text: You can substitute this card for any 1 Fusion Material Monster. The other Fusion Material Monster(s) must be the correct one(s). By Tributing Fusion Material Monsters on the field, including this card, Special Summon 1 LIGHT Fusion Monster from your Fusion Deck.

name: The Little Swordsman of Aile
text: Offer 1 monster on your side of the Field as a Tribute to increase this monster's ATK by 700 points until the end of the turn.

name: The Mask of Remnants
text: Shuffle this card into its owner's Deck, OR if this card was put into play by the effect of "Masked Beast Des Gardius", this card is treated as an Equip Card. Control of the equipped monster is switched.

name: The Masked Beast
text: This monster can only be Ritual Summoned with the Ritual Spell Card, "Curse of the Masked Beast". You must also offer monsters whose total Level Stars equal 8 or more as a Tribute from the field or your hand.

name: The Melting Red Shadow
text: ''This monster melts away to materialize under its enemies, taking them by surprise.''

name: The Portrait's Secret
text: A portrait cursed by the artist, it is said to bring ill fortune to anyone who owns it.

name: The Puppet Magic of Dark Ruler
text: Select 1 Fiend-Type monster from your Graveyard. Remove from play monsters on your side of the field whose total Levels exactly equal the Level of the selected Fiend-Type monster. Then Special Summon the selected monster from your Graveyard.

name: The Regulation of Tribe
text: Select 1 Type of monster. Any monster of the selected Type cannot attack. To keep this card in effect, you must offer 1 monster from the field as a Tribute at each of your Standby Phases. If you cannot, this card is destroyed.

name: The Reliable Guardian
text: Increase 1 face-up monster's DEF by 700 points until the end of this turn.

name: The Rock Spirit
text: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card can only be Special Summoned by removing 1 EARTH monster in your Graveyard from play. Increase the ATK of this monster by 300 points during your opponent's Battle Phase.

name: The Sanctuary in the Sky
text: Battle Damage to the controller of a Fairy-Type monster from a battle involving that Fairy-Type monster becomes 0. (deck contains 2)

name: The Second Sarcophagus
text: This card can only be placed on the field by the effect of The First Sarcophagus"."

name: The Secret of the Bandit
text: This card can only be activated during Main Phase 1. Select 1 face-up monster on the field. Each time the selected monster inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent's Life Points this turn, your opponent discards 1 random card.

name: The Selection
text: Pay 1000 Life Points. Negate the Summon of a monster that has the same Type as a monster on the field, and destroy it.

name: The Shadow Who Controls the Dark
text: A shadow that dwells in the dark, paralyzing its opponents and rendering them harmless.

name: The Shallow Grave
text: Each player selects a monster in their Graveyard and Special Summon it in face-down Defence Position.

name: The Snake Hair
text: A monster with a head of poison snakes. One look from this monster can turn an opponent to stone.

name: The Spell Absorbing Life
text: Flip all face-down Defense Position Monster Cards on the field face-up. Flip Effects are not activated at this time. Increase your Life Points by 400 points for each Effect Monster Card on the field.

name: The Statue of Easter Island
text: A stone monument from Easter Island that launches laser blasts from its rock-hewn lips.

name: The Stern Mystic
text: FLIP: All face-down cards on the field are turned face-up, and then returned to their original position. No card effects are activated when cards are turned face-up.

name: The Thing in the Crater
text: When this card is destroyed and sent from the field to the Graveyard, you can Special Summon 1 Pyro-Type Monster from your hand.

name: The Thing That Hides in the Mud
text: ''This monster melts its way underground to attack enemies from below.''

name: The Third Sarcophagus
text: This card can only be placed on the field by the effect of The First Sarcophagus"."

name: The Tricky
text: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by discarding 1 card.

name: The Trojan Horse
text: If you Tribute Summon an EARTH monster, you can treat this 1 monster as 2 Tribute Monsters for the Tribute Summon.

name: The Unfriendly Amazon
text: Offer 1 of your monsters on the field as a Tribute (excluding this monster) during each of your Standby Phases. If you cannot, this card is destroyed. Monsters used for a Tribute Summon or that are offered as Tributes due to other cards' effects are excluded.

name: The Unhappy Girl
text: While this card is in face-up Attack Position on the field, this card is not destroyed as a result of battle. (Damage calculation is applied normally.) A monster that battled with this card cannot change its battle position, except with a card effect, or attack while this card is in face-up Attack Position on the field.

name: The Unhappy Maiden
text: When this card is sent to the Graveyard as a result of battle, the Battle Phase for that turn ends immediately.

name: The Wandering Doomed
text: ''A monster that wanders the edges of the netherworld.''

name: The Warrior Returning Alive
text: Target 1 Warrior-Type monster in your Graveyard; add that target to your hand.

name: The Wicked Dreadroot
text: This card cannot be Special Summoned. This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set except by Tributing 3 monsters. Halve the ATK and DEF of all monsters on the field, except this card.

name: The Wicked Worm Beast
text: This face-up card on the field is returned to the owner's hand during the End Phase of your turn.

name: Theban Nightmare
text: While you have no cards in your hand and in your Spell & Trap Card Zones, this card gains 1500 ATK.

name: Theinen the Great Sphinx
text: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card cannot be Special Summoned except by paying 500 Life Points when both "Andro Sphinx" and "Sphinx Teleia" on your side of the field are destroyed at the same time; then you can Special Summon this monster from your hand or Deck. When this card is Special Summoned, by paying 500 Life Points, increase the ATK of this card by 3000 points until the end of the End Phase.

name: Thestalos the Firestorm Monarch
text: When this card is Tribute Summoned, discard 1 random card from your opponent's hand. If it was a Monster Card, inflict damage to your opponent equeal to it's level x 100.

name: Thousand Dragon
text: "Time Wizard" + "Baby Dragon"

name: Thousand Energy

name: Thousand Knives

name: Thousand Needles

name: Thousand-Eyes Idol
text: A wicked entity that controls the hearts of men, its thousand eyes are able to see and expand the negative influences in an individual's soul.

name: Icarus Attack

name: Threatening Roar
text: Your opponent cannot declare an attack this turn.

name: Three-Headed Geedo

name: Three-Legged Zombies

name: Throwstone Unit

name: Thunder Crash

name: Thunder Dragon
text: During your Main Phase, by discarding this card, add up to 2 "Thunder Dragons" from your Deck to your hand.

name: Thunder Kid

name: Thunder Nyan Nyan

name: Thunder of Ruler

name: Tiger Axe

name: Time Machine

name: Time Seal
text: Your opponent skips the Draw Phase of his/her next turn.

name: Time Wizard

name: Timeater

name: Timidity
text: Neither player can destroy Set Spell and Trap Cards on the field until your opponent's next End Phase.

name: Toad Master
text: ''A hermit frog that has been in existence for thousands of years, it attacks with tadpoles.''

name: Togex
text: ''An agile monster that rolls up to ram its opponents.''

name: Token Feastevil

name: Token Thanksgiving
text: Destroy all tokens on the field. Increase your Life Points by the number of tokens destroyed x 800 points.

name: Toll
text: Each player must pay 500 Life Points to declare an attack.

name: Tomozaurus
text: Small but vicious, this monster even attacks its own kind.

name: Tongyo

name: Toon Alligator

name: Toon Cannon Soldier
text: This card cannot attack during the turn that it is Normal Summoned, Flip Summoned, or Special Summoned. When "Toon World" on the field is destroyed, destroy this card. If "Toon World" is on your side of the field and your opponent does not control a Toon Monster, this card can attack your opponent's Life Points directly. Tribute 1 monster on your side of the field to inflict 500 points of damage to your opponent's Life Points.

name: Toon Dark Magician Girl
text: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by Tributing 1 monster, while you control "Toon World". If "Toon World" on the field is destroyed, destroy this card. Can attack your opponent directly, unless they control a Toon monster, in which case this card must target a Toon monster for its attacks. Gains 300 ATK for every "Dark Magician" or "Magician of Black Chaos" in either player's GY.

name: Toon Defense
text: When your opponent's monster attacks a face-up Level 4 or lower Toon Monster on your side of the field, you can make the attack a direct attack to your Life Points.

name: Toon Gemini Elf
text: This card cannot attack the turn it is Summoned. If "Toon World" on the field is destroyed, destroy this card. While you control "Toon World" and your opponent controls no Toon Monsters, this card can attack your opponent directly. When this card inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent: Discard 1 random card from your opponent's hand.

name: Toon Goblin Attack Force
text: This card cannot attack during the turn that it is Normal Summoned, Flip Summoned, or Special Summoned. When "Toon World" on the field is destroyed, this card is also destroyed. If "Toon World" is on your side of the field and your opponent does not control a Toon Monster, this card can attack your opponent's Life Points directly. If this card attacks, it is changed to Defense Position at the end of the Battle Phase, and you cannot change this Battle Position until the end of your next turn.

name: Toon Masked Sorcerer
text: This card cannot attack the turn it is Summoned. If "Toon World" on the field is destroyed, destroy this card. While you control "Toon World" and your opponent controls no Toon Monsters, this card can attack your opponent directly. When this card inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent's Life Points: Draw 1 card from your deck.

name: Toon Mermaid
text: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card can only be Special Summoned while you control "Toon World". You can Special Summon this card from your hand (but Tributes are required if it is Level 5 or higher). This card cannot attack during the turn it is Summoned. This card cannot attack unless you pay 500 Life Points. When "Toon World" is destroyed, destroy this card. If your opponent doesn't control a Toon Monster, this card can attack your opponent directly. If your opponent controls a face-up Toon Monster, you must select it as an attack target.

name: Toon Summoned Skull
text: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card can only be Special Summoned while you control "Toon World". You can Special Summon this card from your hand (but Tributes are required if it is Level 5 or higher). This card cannot attack during the turn it is Summoned. This card cannot attack unless you pay 500 Life Points. When "Toon World" is destroyed, destroy this card. If your opponent doesn't control a Toon Monster, this card can attack your opponent directly. If your opponent controls a face-up Toon Monster, you must select it as an attack target.

name: Toon Table of Contents
text: Add 1 "Toon" card or "Manga Ryu-Ran" from your Deck to your hand.

name: Toon World
text: Activate this card by paying 1000 LP.

name: Torike
text: ''Although a poor defender, this monster's sharp horn gives it an edge when attacking.''

name: Tornado Bird
text: FLIP: Return 2 Spell or Trap Cards on the field to the hands of the owner.

name: Tornado Wall
text: Activate only while "Umi" is on the field. As long as "Umi" remains face-up on the field, you take no damage from attacking monsters. When "Umi" is removed from the field, destroy this card.

name: Torpedo Fish
text: While Umi" is face-up on the field, this card is unaffected by any Spell Cards."

name: Just Desserts
text: Inflict 500 points of damage to your opponent's Life Points for each monster on your opponent's side of the field.

name: Total Defense Shogun

name: Totem Dragon
text: This card can be treated as 2 Tributes for the Tribute Summon of a Dragon-Type monster. If this card is in your Graveyard during your Standby Phase and you control no monsters, you can Special Summon this card in Attack Position. You cannot activate this effect if there are any monsters in your Graveyard that are not Dragon-Type. If this card is Special Summoned with this effect, remove it from play when it is removed from the field.

name: Tower of Babel

name: Tragedy
text: You can only activate this card when a monster on your opponent's side of the field in face-up Attack Position is changed to face-up Defense Position. Destroy all Defense Position monsters on your opponent's side of the field.

name: Trakodon
text: A tiger-striped dragon that is often seen racing across the wasteland at tremendous speeds.

name: Magical Dimension

name: Trap Hole

name: Trap Jammer
text: When your opponent activates a Trap Card during the Battle Phase: Negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it.

name: Trap Master
text: FLIP: Select 1 Trap Card on the field and destroy it. If the selected card is Set, pick up and see the card. If it is a Trap Card, it is destroyed. If it is a Spell Card, return it to its original position.

name: Trap of Darkness

name: Tremendous Fire
text: Inflict 1000 points of damage to your opponent's Life Points and 500 points of damage to your Life Points.

name: Trent

name: Tri-Horned Dragon

name: Trial of Nightmare

name: Triangle Power
text: Increase the original ATK and DEF of all face-up Level 1 Normal Monsters (except Tokens) on your side of the field by 2000 points until the End Phase. Destroy all Level 1 Normal Monsters on your side of the field during the End Phase.

name: Messenger of Peace

text: Tribute 1 monster on your side of the field to activate this card. Special Summon 1 Level 7 monster that can be Normal Summoned from your hand. That monster cannot attack this turn.

name: Tribute to the Doomed
text: Discard 1 card. Destroy 1 monster on the field.

name: Tricky Spell 4

name: Tripwire Beast

name: Trojan Blast

name: Troop Dragon
text: If this card is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard as a result of battle, select and Special Summon 1 Troop Dragon" from your Deck to your side of the field. Then shuffle your Deck."

name: Tsukuyomi
text: Cannot be Special Summoned. During the End Phase of the turn this card is Normal Summoned or flipped face-up: Return it to the hand. When this card is Normal Summoned or flipped face-up: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; change that target to face-down Defense Position.

name: Tualatin

If Summoned this way: Choose an Attribute, and if you do, destroy all face-up monsters with that Attribute. Your opponent cannot Normal or Special Summon monsters with that Attribute.

name: Turtle Bird
text: An unusual turtle that not only swims at tremendous speeds, but can also sail across the skies.

name: Turtle Oath
text: This card is used to Ritual Summoned "Crab Turtle". You must also offer monsters whose total Level Stars equal 8 or more from the Field or your hand as a Tribute.

name: Turtle Raccoon

name: Turtle Tiger

name: Turu-Purun

name: Tutan Mask

name: Twin Long Rods #1

name: Twin Long Rods #2

name: Twin Swords of Flashing Light - Tryce

name: Twin-Headed Behemoth

name: Twin-Headed Fire Dragon

name: Twin-Headed Thunder Dragon
text: "Thunder Dragon" + "Thunder Dragon"

name: Twin-Headed Wolf

name: Twinheaded Beast
text: This card can attack twice during the same Battle Phase.

name: Two Thousand Needles
text: When this Defense Position card is attacked and the ATK of the attacking monster is lower than the DEF of this card, destroy the attacking monster at the end of the Damage Step.

name: Two-Headed King Rex
text: A powerful monster whose two heads attack as one.

name: Two-Man Cell Battle

name: Two-Mouth Darkruler

name: Two-Pronged Attack

name: Tyhone
text: Capable of firing cannonballs from its mouth for long-range attacks, this creature is particularly effective in mountain battles.

name: Tyhone #2
text: A crimson dragon that spits fireballs to create a blazing sea of fire.

name: Type Zero Magic Crusher
text: Discard 1 Spell Card from your hand to inflict 500 points of damage to your opponent's Life Points.

name: Tyrant Dragon

Negate the effect of any Trap Card that targets this card, and destroy that Trap Card. If this card is Special Summoned from the Graveyard by another card's effect, you must Tribute 1 Dragon-Type monster.

name: UFO Turtle

name: Ultimate Insect LV1
