During your Standby Phase, send this face-up card to the Graveyard to Special Summon 1 "Ultimate Insect LV3" from your hand or Deck. (You cannot activate this effect the turn this card is Normal Summoned, Special Summoned, or flipped face-up.)

name: Ultimate Insect LV3
text: If this card was Special Summoned by the effect of "Ultimate Insect LV1", as long as this card remains on the field, decrease the ATK of all your opponent's monsters by 300 points. During your Standby Phase, send this face-up card to the Graveyard to Special Summon 1 "Ultimate Insect LV5" from your hand or Deck. (You cannot activate this effect the turn this card is Normal Summoned, Special Summoned, or flipped face-up.)

name: Ultimate Insect LV5
text: If this card was Special Summoned by the effect of "Ultimate Insect LV3", as long as this card remains on the field, decrease the ATK of all your opponent's monsters by 500 points. During your Standby Phase, send this face-up card to the Graveyard to Special Summon 1 "Ultimate Insect LV7" from your hand or Deck. (You cannot activate this effect the turn this card is Normal Summoned, Special Summoned, or flipped face-up.)

name: Ultimate Insect LV7
text: If this card was Special Summoned by the effect of "Ultimate Insect LV5", as long as this card remains face-up on your side of the field, decrease the ATK and DEF of all your opponent's monsters by 700 points.

name: Ultimate Obedient Fiend
text: This card can only attack if this card is the only card on your side of the field and if you also have no cards in your hand. The effects of Effect Monsters that this card destroys are negated.

name: Mobius the Frost Monarch
text: When this card is Tribute Summoned, you can select up to 2 Spell or Trap Cards on the field. Destroy them.

name: Ultra Evolution Pill
text: Tribute 1 Reptile-Type monster on your side of the field. Special Summon 1 Dinosaur-Type Monster from your hand.

name: Umi
text: Increase the ATK and DEF of all Fish, Sea Serpent, Thunder, and Aqua-Type monsters by 200 points. Also decrease the ATK and DEF of all Machine and Pyro-Type monsters by 200 points.

name: Umiiruka
text: Increase the ATK of all WATER monsters by 500 and decreases their DEF by 400 points.

name: Unexpected Dai
text: If you control no monsters: Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower Normal Monster from the Deck.

name: Union Attack
text: Target 1 face-up monster you control; add up the total ATK of all other face-up Attack Position monsters you currently control, then during the Battle Phase of this turn only, the monster gains that much ATK, but cannot inflict battle damage to your opponent, also other face-up Attack Position monsters cannot attack.

name: Union Rider
text: You can take control of up to 1 Union Monster that is currently a monster on your opponent's side of the field, and equip it to this card. The Union Monster that is equipped to this card cannot be changed back to a monster using its own effect.

name: United Resistance
text: The people that gather to swear to fight their oppressors. A revolution is coming.

name: Reckless Greed
text: Draw 2 cards and skip your next 2 Draw Phases.

name: Unity
text: Select 1 monster on your side of the field. The DEF of the selected monster becomes equal to the combined original DEF of all face-up monsters on your side of the field, until the end of this turn.

name: Unknown Warrior of Fiend
text: A deadly duo consisting of a beast master and its loyal servant.

name: Unshaven Angler
text: If you Tribute Summon a WATER monster, you can treat this 1 monster as 2 Tribute Monsters for the Tribute Summon.

name: Return from the Different Dimension
text: Pay half your Life Points. Special Summon as many of your banished monsters as possible. During the End Phase, banish all monsters that were Special Summoned by this effect.

name: Uraby
text: Fast on its feet, this dinosaur rips enemies to shreds with its sharp claws.

name: Ushi Oni
text: A bull fiend restored by the dark arts, this monster appears out of a jar.

name: V-Tiger Jet
text: This ace fighter is unbeatable in a dogfight. It combines with other monsters to launch an array of encircling attacks.

name: Valkyrion the Magna Warrior
text: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card can only be Special Summoned by Tributing "Alpha The Magnet Warrior", "Beta The Magnet Warrior", and "Gamma The Magnet Warrior" from your hand or your side of the field. You can Tribute this card to Special Summon "Alpha The Magnet Warrior", "Beta The Magnet Warrior", and "Gamma The Magnet Warrior" from your Graveyard.

name: Vampire Baby
text: At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card destroyed a monster by battle and sent it to the Graveyard this turn: You can Special Summon that monster to your side of the field.

name: Vampire Genesis
text: This card cannot be Normal Summon or Set. This card cannot be Special Summoned except by removing 1 Vampire Lord" on your side of the field from play. Discard 1 Zombie-Type monster from your hand to the Graveyard to select and Special Summon 1 Zombie-Type monster from your Graveyard with a Level less than the discarded Zombie-Type monster. You can only use this effect once per turn."

name: Vampire Lady
text: When this card inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent: Declare 1 card type (Monster, Spell or Trap); your opponent sends 1 card of that type from their Deck to the Graveyard.

name: Vampire Lord
text: Each time this card inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent, declare 1 card type (Monster, Spell, or Trap). Your opponent selects 1 card of that type from their Deck and sends it to the Graveyard. Also, if this card is destroyed and sent from your field to your Graveyard by your opponent's card effect, it is Special Summoned to your side of the field during your next Standby Phase.

name: Vampire Orchis
text: When this monster is Normal Summoned successfully, you can Special Summon 1 "Des Dendle" from your hand.

name: Vampire's Curse
text: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard: You can pay 500 Life Points; Special Summon it during the Standby Phase of the next turn. When you do: It gains 500 ATK.

name: Van'Dalgyon the Dark Dragon Lord
text:
If you negate the activation of an opponent's Spell/Trap Card(s), or opponent's monster effect(s), with a Counter Trap Card (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If Summoned this way, activate these effects and resolve in sequence, depending on the type of card(s) negated by that Counter Trap:
● Spell: Inflict 1500 damage to your opponent.
● Trap: Target 1 card your opponent controls; destroy that target.
● Monster: Target 1 monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon it.

name: Vengeful Bog Spirit
text: Monsters cannot attack the turn they are Summoned.

name: Vermillion Sparrow
text: "Rhaimundos of the Red Sword" + "Fireyarou"

name: Versago the Destroyer
text: You can substitute this card for any 1 Fusion-Material Monster. When you do this, the other Fusion-Material Monster(s) must be the correct one(s).

name: Victory Dragon
text: This card cannot be Special Summoned. To Tribute Summon this card, you must Tribute 3 Dragon-Type monsters. If this card attacks your opponent directly and reduces their Life Points to 0, you win the Match.

name: Vile Germs
text: A Plant-Type monster equipped with this card increases its ATK and DEF by 300 points.

name: Vilepawn Archfiend
text: The controller of this card pays 500 Life Points during each of his/her Standby Phases (this is not optional). When this card is targeted by the effect of a card controlled by your opponent, when resolving the effect, roll a six-sided die. If the result is 3, negate the effect and destroy the opponent's card. As long as this card remains on the field, your opponent cannot attack any Archfiend Monster Card on your side of the field except Vilepawn Archfiend"."

name: Violent Rain
text: This monster can call forth sudden torrents of battering rain.

name: Violet Crystal
text: A Zombie-Type monster equipped with this card increases its ATK and DEF by 300 points.

name: Virus Cannon
text: Tribute any number of monsters, except Tokens; your opponent sends an equal number of Spells from their Deck to the GY (or all their Spells, if lower than the number of Tributes).

name: Viser Des
text: If this card is Normal Summoned: Target 1 monster your opponent controls; during your third Standby Phase after this effect's activation, destroy that monster. This card cannot be destroyed by battle while the targeted monster is on the field.

name: Vishwar Randi
text: ''This lady warrior with unquenchable bloodlust serves the forces of darkness.''

name: Volcanic Hammerer
text: Once per turn, you can inflict damage to your opponent equal to the number of "Volcanic" monsters in your Graveyard x 200. If you activate this effect, this card cannot attack during this turn.

name: Volcanic Slicer
text: Once per turn, you can inflict 500 damage to your opponent. If you activate this effect, this card cannot attack during this turn.

name: Vorse Raider
text: This wicked Beast-Warrior does every horrid thing imaginable, and loves it! His axe bears the marks of his countless victims.

name: VW-Tiger Catapult
text:
"V-Tiger Jet" + "W-Wing Catapult"_x000D_
Must first be Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by banishing the above cards you control. (You do not use "Polymerization".) You can discard 1 card, then target 1 monster your opponent controls; change that target's battle position. (Flip Effects are not activated.)

name: VWXYZ-Dragon Catapult Cannon
text:
"VW-Tiger Catapult" + "XYZ-Dragon Cannon"_x000D_
Must first be Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by banishing the above cards you control. (You do not use "Polymerization".) Once per turn: You can target 1 card your opponent controls; banish that target. When this card declares an attack on an opponent's monster: You can target the attack target; change that attack target's battle position. (Flip Effects are not activated.)

name: W-Wing Catapult
text: Once per turn, you can either: Target 1 "V-Tiger Jet" you control; equip this card to that target, OR: Unequip this card and Special Summon it. A monster equipped with this card gains 400 ATK/DEF, also if the equipped monster would be destroyed by battle or card effect, destroy this card instead.

name: Waboku
text: You take no Battle Damage this turn. Your monsters cannot be destroyed by battle this turn.

name: Wall of Illusion
text: A monster that attacks this monster is returned to its owner's hand after damage calculation. Damage calculation is applied normally.

name: Wall of Revealing Light
text: When you activate this card, pay any multiple of 1000 Life Points. None of your opponent's monsters with ATK equal to or less than the Life Points you paid can attack.

name: Wall Shadow
text: You cannot Normal Summon this monster. This card can only be Special Summoned by offering "Labyrinth Wall" equipped with "Magical Labyrinth" as a Tribute. No other Tribute Monsters are necessary.

name: Wandering Mummy
text: You can flip this card into face-down Defense Position once per turn during your Main Phase. After you use this effect, rearrange the face-down Defense Position monsters on your side of the field, then return them in face-down Defense Position.

name: War-Lion Ritual
text: This card is used to Ritual Summon "Super War-Lion". You must also Tribute monsters from your hand or field whose total Levels equal 7 or more.

name: Warrior Dai Grepher
text: The warrior who can manipulate dragons. Nobody knows his mysterious past.

name: Warrior Elimination
text: Destroy all Warrior monsters on the field.

name: Warrior Lady of the Wasteland
text: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard: You can Special Summon 1 EARTH Warrior-Type monster with 1500 or less ATK from your Deck, in face-up Attack Position.

name: Warrior of Atlantis
text: You can discard this card to the Graveyard; add 1 "A Legendary Ocean" from your Deck to your hand.

name: Warrior of Tradition
text: Sonic Maid + "Beautiful Headhuntress"

name: Warrior of Zera
text: A wandering warrior who seeks the sanctuary where he can gain the power of the Archlords. To escape the temptation of evil fiends, he fights solo day by day.

name: Wasteland
text: Increases the ATK and DEF of all Dinosaur, Zombie, and Rock-Type monsters by 200 points.

name: Watapon
text: If this card is added to your hand from your Deck by the effect of a Spell, Trap or Monster Card, you can Special Summon this card on your side of the field.

name: Water Element
text: ''A sea-dwelling spirit that takes away sight by clouding the area in fog.''

name: Water Girl
text: ''A lovely lady who can launch water projectiles that turn into lethal ice spikes before they reach an opponent.''

name: Water Magician
text: This monster swamps an opponent with an almost endless supply of water.

name: Water Omotics
text: Transforms the water overflowing from a jar into attacking dragons.

name: Waterdragon Fairy
text: ''A water fairy that is said to be able to summon a giant sea serpent.''

name: Wattkid
text: A creature that electrocutes opponents with bolts of lightning.

name: Wave-Motion Cannon
text: During your Main Phase, you can send this card to the Graveyard to inflict 1000 points of damage to your opponent for each of your Standby Phases that have passed since this card was activated.

name: Weapon Change
text: Only once during each of your Standby Phases, you can pay 700 Life Points to activate this card's effect. Switch the ATK and DEF of 1 Warrior-Type or Machine-Type monster on your side of the field until the end of your opponent's next End Phase. When this card is destroyed, the effect is negated.

name: Weather Control
text: ''This creature controls weather and is often the cause of mountain storms.''

name: Weather Report
text: FLIP: Destroys all opponent's face-up "Swords of Revealing Light" on the field. If "Swords of Revealing Light" is destroyed, you can perform your Battle Phase twice this turn (or your next turn, if activated during your opponent's turn).

name: Wetha
text: A spirit that controls rain and is capable of summoning hurricanes to blow the enemy away.

name: Whiptail Crow
text: Attacks from the sky with a whip-like tail.

name: Whirlwind Prodigy
text: If you Tribute Summon a WIND monster, you can treat this 1 monster as 2 Tribute Monsters for the Tribute Summon.

name: White Dolphin
text: ''A white dolphin with a horn that summons huge tidal waves.''

name: White Dragon Ritual
text: This card is used to Ritual Summon "Paladin of White Dragon". You must also Tribute monsters whose total Levels equal 4 or more from the field or your hand.

name: White Hole
text: When your opponent plays "Dark Hole", the monsters on your side of the field are not destroyed.

name: White Magical Hat
text: When this card inflicts damage to your opponent's Life Points, 1 card must be discarded randomly from your opponent's hand to the Graveyard.

name: White Magician Pikeru
text: During your Standby Phase, increase your Life Points by 400 points for each monster on your side of the field.

name: White Ninja
text: FLIP: Destroy 1 Defense Position monster on the field.

name: Wicked Dragon with the Ersatz Head
text: ''A two-headed dragon with a pair of jaws that can tear an enemy to shreds.''

name: Wicked-Breaking Flamberge - Baou
text: Send 1 card from your hand to the Graveyard to equip this card. Increase the ATK of the equipped monster by 500 points. If a monster equipped with this card destroys a monster as a result of battle, the effect of that monster is negated.

name: Widespread Ruin
text: Activate only when your opponent declares an attack. Destroy 1 Attack Position monster your opponent controls with the highest ATK. (If it's a tie, you get to choose.)

name: Wild Nature's Release
text: Select 1 Beast-Type or Beast-Warrior-Type monster; it gains ATK equal to its DEF until the end of this turn. Destroy the monster during the End Phase.

name: Wilmee
text: A rabid rabbit that shears through opposition with its sharp skewers.

name: Windstorm of Etaqua
text: Change the battle positions of all face-up monsters your opponent controls.

name: Wing Eagle
text: ''This flying creature never misses its intended target.''

name: Wing Egg Elf
text: ''This fairy in an eggshell uses massive wings to blow back almost any projectile attack.''

name: Winged Cleaver
text: Few can withstand the scythe-like arms of this dangerous creature.

name: Winged Dragon, Guardian of the Fortress #1
text: A dragon commonly found guarding mountain fortresses. Its signature attack is a sweeping dive from out of the blue.

name: Winged Dragon, Guardian of the Fortress #2
text: This creature's wings are capable of generating tornadoes.

name: Winged Egg of New Life
text: ''It is said to signal that life is growing in a woman's womb.''

name: Winged Kuriboh
text: If this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard: Any further Battle Damage you take this turn becomes 0.

name: Winged Minion
text: Tribute this face-up card. Select 1 face-up Fiend-Type monster on the field. Increase the ATK and DEF of the monster by 700 points as long as it remains face-up on the field.

name: Winged Rhynos
text: During either player's turn, when a Trap Card is activated (except during the Damage Step): You can return this face-up card from the field to the hand.

name: Winged Sage Falcos
text: You can return your opponent's face-up Attack Position monster that is sent to the Graveyard by this monster as a result of battle to the top of his/her Deck.

name: Wings of Wicked Flame
text: Crimson wings of fire make this a very lethal creature.

name: Wingweaver
text: A six-winged fairy who prays for peace and hope.

name: Witch Doctor of Chaos
text: FLIP: Select 1 Monster Card from you or your opponent's Graveyard. Remove it from play.

name: Solemn Judgment
text: Pay half of your Life Points. Negate an activation of a Spell / Trap Card / Normal Summon / Flip Summon / Special Summon and destroy the Spell Card, Trap Card or Summoned monster.

name: Witch's Apprentice
text: As long as this card remains face-up on the field, increase the ATK of all DARK monsters by 500 points and decrease the ATK of all LIGHT monsters by 400 points.

name: Witty Phantom
text: Dressed in a night-black tuxedo, this creature presides over death.

name: Wodan the Resident of the Forest
text: Increase this card's ATK by 100 for every Plant-Type monster that is face-up on the field.

name: Wolf
text: Dis alpha wolf yoozes his sense a smell ta find da enemy. 'ey, quit sniffin at my socks!

name: Wolf Axwielder
text: Once it has started battle, this monster attacks fiercely and cannot stop.

name: Wood Clown
text: ''A creature with a wicked smile and a lethal sickle.''

name: Wood Remains
text: ''A living corpse of wood re-animated by the power of darkness.''

name: Woodborg Inpachi
text: The new form of the enigmatic Inpachi, remodeled by cutting-edge Dark World technology. Maneuverability has been sacrificed for strong armor, which was considered more important.

name: Woodland Sprite
text: Send 1 Equip Card equipped to this card to the Graveyard. Inflict 500 points of damage to your opponent's Life Points.

name: World Suppression
text: You can activate this card when a Field Magic Card is activated. Negate the Field Magic Card during the turn this card is activated.

name: Worm Drake
text: Once this monster wraps itself around a victim, there is no escape.

name: WOW Warrior
text: A fish with arms?

name: Wretched Ghost of the Attic
text: A harmless monster found lurking in just about any attic.

name: Wynn the Wind Charmer
text: FLIP: Take control of 1 WIND monster on your opponent's side of the field, for as long as this card remains face-up on the field.

name: X-Head Cannon
text: A monster with a mighty cannon barrel, it is able to integrate its attacks. It attacks in many ways by combining and separating with other monsters.

name: Xing Zhen Hu
text: Activate by selecting 2 Set Spell or Trap Cards on the field. The selected Spell or Trap Cards cannot be activated.

name: XY-Dragon Cannon
text:
X-Head Cannon + "Y-Dragon Head"
This card can only be Special Summoned from your Fusion Deck by removing from play the above cards on your side of the field. (You do not use "Polymerization"). This card cannot be Special Summoned from the Graveyard. Discard 1 card from your hand to destroy 1 face-up Spell or Trap Card on your opponent's side of the field."

name: XYZ-Dragon Cannon
text:
X-Head Cannon + "Y-Dragon Head" + "Z-Metal Tank"
This card can only be Special Summoned from your Extra Deck by removing from play the above cards you control. (You do not use "Polymerization".) This card cannot be Special Summoned from the Graveyard. You can discard 1 card to destroy 1 card your opponent controls.

name: XZ-Tank Cannon
text:
X-Head Cannon + "Z-Metal Tank"
This card can only be Special Summoned from your Fusion Deck by removing from play the above cards on your side of the field. (You do not use "Polymerization"). This card cannot be Special Summoned from the Graveyard. Discard 1 card from your hand to destroy 1 face-down Spell or Trap Card on your opponent's side of the field."

name: Y-Dragon Head
text: Once per turn, during your Main Phase, if you control this card on the field, you can equip it to your "X-Head Cannon" as an Equip Card, OR unequip the Union equipment and Special Summon this card in face-up Attack Position. While equipped to a monster by this card's effect, increase the ATK/DEF of the equipped monster by 400 points. (1 monster can only be equipped with 1 Union Monster at a time. If the equipped monster is destroyed as a result of battle, destroy this card instead.)

name: Yado Karu
text: When this card is changed from Defense Position to Attack Position, you can place any number of cards from your hand at the bottom of your Deck in any order you desire.

name: Yaiba Robo
text: A cubical machine equipped with cutting blades for shredding an opponent to mincemeat.

name: Yamadron
text: This monster has three fire-breathing heads and can form a sea of blazing flames.

name: Yamata Dragon
text: This card cannot be Special Summoned. This card returns to the owner's hand during the End Phase of the turn that this card is Normal Summoned or flipped face-up. When this card inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent's Life Points, draw cards from your Deck until you have 5 cards in your hand

name: Yamatano Dragon Scroll
text: ''A dragon conjured from the very scroll in which it was depicted.''

name: Yami
text: Increases the ATK and DEF of all Fiend and Spellcaster-Type monsters by 200 points. Also decreases the ATK and DEF of all Fairy-Type monsters by 200 points.

name: Yaranzo
text: A treasure box containing a monster that attacks any unwary bandit.

name: Yashinoki
text: ''An intelligent palm tree that drops a hail of rock-hard coconuts on its enemies.''

name: Ultimate Offering
text: You can pay 500 Life Points to Normal Summon or Set 1 extra monster. You can only activate this effect during your Main Phase or your opponent's Battle Phase.

name: Yellow Gadget
text: When this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Green Gadget" from your Deck to your hand.

name: Yellow Luster Shield
text: Increase the DEF of all monsters on your side of the field by 300 points.

name: Yomi Ship
text: When this card is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard as a result of battle, destroy the monster that destroyed this card.

name: Yormungarde
text: ''An extremely long snake that dwells in the world of myth.''

name: Yu-Jo Friendship
text: Offer your opponent a handshake. If they accept your handshake, each player's Life Points become half the combined Life Points of both players. If you have "Unity" in your hand and show it to your opponent, they must accept the handshake.

name: YZ-Tank Dragon
text:
Y-Dragon Head + "Z-Metal Tank"
This card can only be Special Summoned from your Fusion Deck by removing from play the above cards on your side of the field. (You do not use "Polymerization"). This card cannot be Special Summoned from the Graveyard. Discard 1 card from your hand to destroy 1 face-down Monster Card on your opponent's side of the field."

name: Z-Metal Tank
text: Once per turn, during your Main Phase, if you control this card on the field, you can equip it to your "X-Head Cannon" or "Y-Dragon Head" as an Equip Card, OR unequip the Union equipment and Special Summon this card in face-up Attack Position. While equipped to a monster by this card's effect, increase the ATK/DEF of the equipped monster by 600 points. (1 monster can only be equipped with 1 Union Monster at a time. If the equipped monster is destroyed as a result of battle, destroy this card instead.).

name: Zaborg the Thunder Monarch
text: When this card is Tribute Summoned: Target 1 monster on the field; destroy that target.

name: Zanki
text: ''His swiftly drawn blade delivers quick and fatal damage.''

name: Zarigun
text: ''A lethal crawfish with extremely dangerous claws.''

name: Zera Ritual
text: This card is used to Ritual Summon "Zera the Mant". You must also Tribute monsters from the field or your hand whose total Levels equal 8 or more.

name: Zera the Mant
text: This card can only be Ritual Summoned with the Ritual Spell Card, "Zera Ritual".

name: Zeradias, Herald of Heaven
text: You can discard this card to the GY; add 1 "The Sanctuary in the Sky" from your Deck to your hand. If "The Sanctuary in the Sky" is not on the field, destroy this card.

name: Zero Gravity
text: Change the battle positions of all face-up monsters on the field.

name: Zoa
text: A monster whose full potential can be achieved when outfitted with "Metalmorph"

name: Zolga
text: When a monster is Tribute Summoned by Tributing this card: The owner of this card gains 2000 Life Points.

name: Zoma the Spirit
text: Special Summon this card in Defense Position as an Effect Monster (Zombie/DARK/Level 4/ATK 1800/DEF 500). (This card is also still a Trap.) If this card Summoned this way is destroyed by battle: Inflict damage to your opponent equal to the ATK of the monster that destroyed it.

name: Zombie Tiger
text: Once per turn, during your Main Phase, if you control this card on the field, you can equip it to your Decayed Commander" as an Equip Card, OR unequip the Union equipment and Special Summon this card in face-up Attack Position. While equipped to a monster by this card's effect, increase the ATK/DEF of the equipped monster by 500 points, and each time it destroys 1 of your opponent's monsters, your opponent discards 1 card randomly from his/her hand. (1 monster can only be equipped with 1 Union Monster at a time. If the equipped monster is destroyed as a result of battle, destroy this card instead.)"

name: Zombie Warrior
text: "Skull Servant" + "Battle Warrior"

name: Zombyra the Dark
text: This card cannot attack your opponent directly. If this card destroys a monster by battle: This card loses 200 ATK.

name: Zone Eater
text: A monster attacked by this card will be destroyed during the End Phase of the 5th turn after the attack.

name: Sylvan Hermitree
text: Once per turn: You can excavate the top card of your Deck, and if it is a Plant-Type monster, send it to the Graveyard, and if you do, draw 1 card. Otherwise, place it on the bottom of your Deck. If this card is excavated from the Deck and sent to the Graveyard by a card effect: Look at up to 3 cards from the top of your Deck, then place them on the top of the Deck in any order.

name: Magic Planter
text: Send 1 face-up Continuous Trap Card you control to the Graveyard. Draw 2 cards.

name: Gravekeeper's Ambusher
text: When this card is flipped face-up: You can target 1 card in your opponent's GY; place that target on the bottom of their Deck. If this card is sent from the field to the GY after being flipped face-up: You can target 1 "Necrovalley" card in your GY; add that target to your hand. These effects are unaffected by "Necrovalley".

name: Harpie Oracle
text:
This card's name becomes "Harpie Lady" while on the field or in the GY. You can only use each of these effects of "Harpie Oracle" once per turn.
● If you control a Level 5 or higher "Harpie" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand.
● If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 Spell/Trap from your GY to your hand, that specifically lists the card "Harpie Lady Sisters" in its text, during the End Phase of this turn.

name: Darklord Nurse Reficule
text: Any effect that would make your opponent gain LP inflicts the same amount of damage to them, instead.

name: Mokey Mokey Adrift
text: This card's name becomes "Mokey Mokey" and is treated as a Normal Monster while face-up on the field or in the GY. You can discard this card; add 1 "Mokey Mokey" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Mokey Mokey Adrift".

name: Rai-Mei
text: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard, you can add 1 Level 2 or lower LIGHT monster from your Deck to your hand.

name: Frost and Flame Dragon
text: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 FIRE and 2 WATER monsters from your Graveyard, and cannot be Special Summoned by other ways. Once per turn: You can discard 1 card to target 1 monster on the field; destroy that target.

name: Toon Bookmark
text: Add 1 "Toon World", or 1 card that mentions it, from your Deck to your hand, except "Toon Bookmark". If a "Toon World(s)" you control would be destroyed by card effect, you can banish this card from your GY instead. You can only activate 1 "Toon Bookmark" per turn.

name: Foolish Return
text: Target 1 card in your opponent's GY; shuffle it into the Deck.

name: Arcane Barrier
text: Each time a face-up Spellcaster monster(s) on the field is destroyed, place 1 Spell Counter on this card (max. 4). You can send this card and 1 face-up Spellcaster monster you control to the GY; draw 1 card for each Spell Counter that was on this card.

name: Solemn Scolding
text: If this is the only Set card in your Spell & Trap Zone, when a monster(s) would be Summoned, OR a Spell/Trap Card, or monster effect is activated: Pay 3000 LP; negate the Summon or activation, and if you do, destroy that card.

name: Needlebug Nest
text: Send the top 5 cards of your Deck to the Graveyard.

name: Archfiend Heiress
text: If this card is sent to the GY by card effect, or by being destroyed by battle: You can add 1 "Archfiend" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Archfiend Heiress". You can only use this effect of "Archfiend Heiress" once per turn.

name: Elemental HERO Nova Master
text:
1 "Elemental HERO" monster + 1 FIRE monster
Must be Fusion Summoned. If this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: Draw 1 card.
